top_signals.title: Asia’s currencies are flashing the oil shock alarm
top_signals.summary: Asia buys about 80% of oil shipped through the Strait of Hormuz, and stress in foreign exchange markets is one of the clearest signs of rising fuel prices starting to hurt growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Galaxy’s Novogratz and BitGo face off in court over $100 million claim: Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: In 2022, Galaxy said it was abandoning its acquisition plan due to BitGo's 'failure to deliver ... audited financial statements for 2021.'
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
